untranslatable_reason: Signal requires earnings announcement detection (event-driven trigger) and specific threshold/half_life/backtest_sharpe parameters marked as AUTHOR_SILENT. The backtest engine does not support explicit earnings date detection or the ability to compare against a dynamically calculated 90-day moving standard deviation benchmark in a conditional rule. Additionally, exact backtest period (TT days) is unspecified. Approximated entry logic using returns vs hvol_20 as volatility-adjusted proxy, but this does not capture the true PEAD drift mechanics.
translation_notes: PEAD strategy requires event-based triggering on earnings announcement dates (not supported by indicator-based rules). Attempted to approximate volatility-adjusted return comparison using hvol_20 as a 20-day historical volatility proxy, but this is not equivalent to a 90-day moving standard deviation benchmark. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect that PEAD can be bullish or bearish depending on surprise direction. Exit conditions reversed to simple return reversals due to AUTHOR_SILENT specification. This translation is a lossy approximation and should be reviewed with domain expertise.
